center.name: Joseph Wolf
center.summary: Joseph Wolf是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡、Lovely cotinga，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lovely cotinga (Cotinga amabilis) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae. It is found in Mexico and every Central American country except El Salvador.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests
